title: Face Off 6: The Ticket of Destiny
original_title: Lật Mặt 6: Tấm Vé Định Mệnh
overview: A friend group bought a lottery ticket and won the jackpot but the ticket holder of the ticket accidentally died. Some of the surviving friends intended to unravel their friend and retrieve the winning ticket, some don't.
